aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request

deadline:AssociatedMembershipLevel.description: Filters access by the associated membership level of the principal provided in the request

deadline:CalledAction.description: Filters access by the allowed action in the request

deadline:FarmMembershipLevels.description: Filters access by membership levels on the farm

deadline:FleetMembershipLevels.description: Filters access by membership levels on the fleet

deadline:JobMembershipLevels.description: Filters access by membership levels on the job

deadline:MembershipLevel.description: Filters access by the membership level passed in the request

deadline:PrincipalId.description: Filters access by the principle ID provided in the request

deadline:QueueMembershipLevels.description: Filters access by membership levels on the queue

deadline:RequesterPrincipalId.description: Filters access by the user calling the Deadline Cloud API
